hooks.command:
jq -n '{hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"SessionStart",additionalContext:"# cosmos-backend conventions (loaded at session start)

**Pick the right lane before writing code:**
- Harness (app/services/harness/) → harness-builder
- LangGraph agents (app/agents/) → agent-author
- FastAPI routes (app/api/) → route-author
- System prompts (app/agents/prompts/) → prompt-engineer
- Supabase work → db-architect
- Code review → code-reviewer
- Tests → test-author
- Bugs / failures → debugger
- Cross-layer plan → planner

**Always:** Context7 MCP before library code; Supabase MCP for all DB ops. Skills auto-loaded into relevant subagents: claude-api (agent-author, prompt-engineer, debugger), supabase-postgres-best-practices (db-architect, code-reviewer, debugger).

**Slash commands:** /add-section, /new-migration, /check-harness, /run-backend, /explain-chart-pipeline, /fetch-docs.

**Rules:** see .claude/rules/."}}'

prompt=$(jq -r '.prompt // ""' 2>/dev/null); hints=""; printf -v nl '\n'; if echo "$prompt" | grep -qiE '\b(langgraph|fastapi|supabase|anthropic|pydantic|httpx|langchain|reportlab)\b'; then hints="$hints$nl- Library mentioned → Context7 MCP (resolve-library-id + get-library-docs) before writing code."; fi; if echo "$prompt" | grep -qiE '\b(migration|schema|rls|table|column|postgres|supabase)\b'; then hints="$hints$nl- DB work → db-architect subagent or /new-migration. Never psql."; fi; if echo "$prompt" | grep -qiE '\b(prompt|new section|personality|career|marriage|mind|wealth|romance|spirituality)\b'; then hints="$hints$nl- Section / prompt work → /add-section, or prompt-engineer + harness-builder."; fi; if echo "$prompt" | grep -qiE '\b(route|endpoint|handler|api/)'; then hints="$hints$nl- Route work → route-author. async + Pydantic + queries.py."; fi; if echo "$prompt" | grep -qiE '\b(harness|yoga|dignity|aspect|significator|whole.?sign)\b'; then hints="$hints$nl- Harness work → harness-builder. No LLM/AstrologyAPI imports in app/services/harness/."; fi; if echo "$prompt" | grep -qiE '\b(tool use|streaming|thinking|claude|anthropic)\b'; then hints="$hints$nl- Anthropic SDK → invoke claude-api skill (or delegate to agent-author/prompt-engineer which auto-load it)."; fi; if echo "$prompt" | grep -qiE '\b(index|postgres|query plan|explain analyze|jsonb|btree|gin)\b'; then hints="$hints$nl- Postgres performance → invoke supabase-postgres-best-practices skill (or delegate to db-architect/code-reviewer which auto-load it)."; fi; if echo "$prompt" | grep -qiE '\b(pdf|reportlab|report\.pdf)\b'; then hints="$hints$nl- PDF work → pdf skill (auto-loaded into route-author). The report endpoint is /api/charts/{id}/report.pdf."; fi; if echo "$prompt" | grep -qiE '\b(test|tests|pytest|coverage)\b'; then hints="$hints$nl- Tests → test-author subagent. uv run pytest, fixture-based, no harness mocks."; fi; if echo "$prompt" | grep -qiE '\b(review|code review|pr review)\b'; then hints="$hints$nl- Review → code-reviewer subagent. Read-only; checks harness-first + RLS + async."; fi; if echo "$prompt" | grep -qiE '\b(bug|failing|error|traceback|500|stack trace)\b'; then hints="$hints$nl- Failure → debugger subagent. Pulls Supabase logs via MCP, isolates root cause."; fi; if echo "$prompt" | grep -qiE '\b(plan|design|architect|breakdown)\b'; then hints="$hints$nl- Multi-layer task → planner subagent."; fi; if [ -n "$hints" ]; then jq -n --arg h "$hints" '{hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"UserPromptSubmit",additionalContext:("# Routing hints" + $h)}}'; else echo '{}'; fi

cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""' 2>/dev/null); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '(^|[^a-z])psql([^a-z]|$)|supabase db (push|reset|execute)|sqlite3 |mysql '; then jq -n '{permissionDecision:"deny",permissionDecisionReason:"Direct SQL via shell is disallowed. Use mcp__supabase__execute_sql / mcp__supabase__apply_migration. See .claude/rules/mcp-usage.md"}'; else echo '{}'; fi

file=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""' 2>/dev/null); if echo "$file" | grep -qE 'app/services/harness/'; then jq -n '{hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"PreToolUse",additionalContext:"HARNESS LANE — delegate to harness-builder subagent. See .claude/rules/harness-first.md"}}'; elif echo "$file" | grep -qE 'app/agents/prompts/'; then jq -n '{hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"PreToolUse",additionalContext:"PROMPT LANE — delegate to prompt-engineer subagent."}}'; elif echo "$file" | grep -qE 'app/agents/'; then jq -n '{hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"PreToolUse",additionalContext:"AGENT LANE — delegate to agent-author subagent."}}'; elif echo "$file" | grep -qE 'app/api/'; then jq -n '{hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"PreToolUse",additionalContext:"ROUTE LANE — delegate to route-author subagent."}}'; elif echo "$file" | grep -qE 'app/db/'; then jq -n '{hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"PreToolUse",additionalContext:"DB LANE — delegate to db-architect subagent."}}'; else echo '{}'; fi

file=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""' 2>/dev/null); if echo "$file" | grep -qE 'app/agents/prompts/[a-z_]+\.py$'; then jq -n '{hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"PostToolUse",additionalContext:"Prompt file written. Verify: registered in app/agents/registry.py, build_<section>_context exists in app/services/harness/context_builder.py, listed in VALID_SECTIONS. Run /check-harness."},suppressOutput:true}'; elif echo "$file" | grep -qE 'app/db/migrations/.*\.sql$'; then jq -n '{hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"PostToolUse",additionalContext:"Migration written. Apply via mcp__supabase__apply_migration (not psql), then mcp__supabase__get_advisors."},suppressOutput:true}'; elif echo "$file" | grep -qE 'app/services/harness/'; then jq -n '{hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"PostToolUse",additionalContext:"Harness edited. Run /check-harness; confirm no anthropic/AstrologyAPI imports leaked in."},suppressOutput:true}'; elif echo "$file" | grep -qE 'app/agents/registry\.py$'; then jq -n '{hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"PostToolUse",additionalContext:"Registry changed. Verify: uv run python -c \"from app.agents.registry import AGENT_REGISTRY; print(list(AGENT_REGISTRY.keys()))\""},suppressOutput:true}'; else echo '{"suppressOutput":true}'; fi
